statement: NVIDIA recorded no Data Center Hopper shipments to China in Q1 fiscal 2027 versus $4.6 billion a year earlier; H200 licenses granted from February 2026 have generated no revenue yet and carry a 25% US-import tariff.
why: Export controls eliminated NVIDIA's China datacenter GPU revenue and constrain the limited licensed reopening with tariffs.

impact.mechanism: Loss of China datacenter GPU shipments removes a large slice of addressable demand NVIDIA can serve.

evidence.excerpt: no shipments of Data Center Hopper products to China occurred during the quarter, compared with $4.6 billion in Q1 FY2026
